Shape collection for a slide

Source: R/slide.R
SlideShapes.Rd

Supports indexed access (1-based), length(), and iteration via to_list().

Super classes

rpptx::ElementProxy -> rpptx::ParentedElementProxy -> SlideShapes

Usage

  left,
  top,
  width,
  height,
  poster_frame_image = NULL,
  mime_type = "video/unknown"
)

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

SlideShapes$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
